description: aip.dev publishes API Improvement Proposals (AIPs), design documents that summarize Google's API design decisions and provide guidance others can adopt for their own API design. The site links to public documentation content and a GitHub repository, but no programmatic integration interface was found on this domain.
summary: aip.dev appears to be a public documentation website for API Improvement Proposals and exposes no developer integration surfaces such as HTTP APIs, GraphQL APIs, MCP servers, or CLIs.
